description: Grid electricity supplied by electricity-supply states.
unit_convention: GJ or MWh depending on row
notes: End-use rows treat electricity as a final-energy input; electricity-related emissions are represented by electricity-supply states, not end-use scope-2 coefficients.
Direct combustion emissions use representative NGA factor.

description: Thermal or metallurgical coal input at reduced-form commodity level.
notes: Used as a generic coal commodity in Phase 1; split into thermal/coking coal in Phase 2 if needed.

description: Aggregate petroleum products for transport and stationary liquid-fuel use.
notes: Combines petrol, diesel and similar refined liquid fuels at MVP level.

description: Low-carbon hydrogen final-energy or reductant input.
notes: Direct combustion/emissions coefficient set to zero at point of use in this library; upstream emissions depend on hydrogen supply assumptions outside this package.

description: Solid/liquid biomass or alternative bioenergy fuel.
notes: Biogenic CO2 not counted in direct CO2e field in Phase 1.
Added beyond minimum commodity taxonomy because it is material to steel route choice.

description: Iron ore / pellet / concentrate feedstock for primary steel routes.
notes: Added beyond minimum commodity taxonomy because it is material to steel route choice.

description: CO2 transport/storage or equivalent capture service for CCS-enabled process states.
notes: Separate from negative-emissions output states; included to preserve a clean upgrade path to explicit CCS infrastructure.

description: Intermediate direct reduced iron output consumed by decomposed crude-steel melt and refine roles.
notes: Introduced for the crude-steel role-decomposition pilot; not an exogenous final-demand commodity.
